#  Project Roadmap

## Phase 1 (GSSoC)
- Basic UI (Landing page, product listing)
- Backend setup
- Product APIs
- Documentation

## Phase 2
- User authentication
- Image upload
- Search and filters

## Phase 3
- AI-based recommendations
- Sustainability impact tracking
- Mobile app version

## Future Scope
- Community features
- Chat system
- Carbon footprint insights
